name: Config Improvements

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Config Improvements is complete and correct

scope: Two config subsystem improvements: (1) Add a 'wolfcastle config show' command that displays the fully resolved config after the three-tier merge so users can debug override behavior. (2) Add unknown-field detection to config unmarshalling -- json.Unmarshal silently ignores typos like 'modles'. Add post-unmarshal diff or use DisallowUnknownFields to warn users of unrecognized keys.
success_criteria: wolfcastle config show prints fully resolved config as valid JSON and supports --tier flag for individual tier inspection
Unknown fields in any config tier produce a warning naming the field and source tier without preventing config loading
All new code has tests and maintains >90% coverage

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 leaf children: config-show-command (2 tasks: spec + implementation) and unknown-field-detection (2 tasks: spec + implementation). The two features are independent and can be worked in parallel. Each leaf starts with a spec task because both introduce new interfaces: a new CLI command surface and a new warning return path from config.Load(). Ordering: specs before implementation within each leaf; no cross-leaf dependencies.
